attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CMTR.REASON_ID, 
CMTR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
CMTR.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
CMTR.CREATION_DATE, 
CMTR.CREATED_BY, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.REASON_NAME,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CMTR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.DESCRIPTION,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CMTR.DISABLE_DATE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE1,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE2,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE3,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE4,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE5,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE6,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE7,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE8,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE9,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE10,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE11,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE12,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE13,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE14,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE15,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.WORKFLOW_NAME,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.WORKFLOW_DISPLAY_NAME,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.WORKFLOW_PROCESS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.WORKFLOW_DISPLAY_PROCESS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
CMTR.REASON_TYPE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.REASON_TYPE_DISPLAY,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.REASON_CONTEXT_CODE,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
CMTR.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CMTR.GLOBAL_NAME,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL) 
FROM
 CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_REAS CMTR 
WHERE
 CMTR.GES_UPDATE_DATE > '$$LastExtractDate'
